name: shre-coding-rules
description: Shared coding rules skill and model entrypoint plugin for cross-repository engineering standards.

interface.shortDescription: Shared coding contract for multiple models and agents.
interface.longDescription: Installs a reusable shared coding rules skill and a single-source-of-truth contract that CODEX, CLAUDE, GEMINI, and AGENTS entry files can all reference.
interface.privacyPolicyURL: [TODO: add privacy policy URL after publishing]
defaultPrompt: Apply the shared coding rules before editing this repository.
Review this change against the shared coding contract.
Adapt this repository to use the shared coding rules as its default agent baseline.
